creator: microsoft.com

evidence.text: The Ask Microsoft web agent uses generative orchestration to determine the right agent to handle that question. It can also co-ordinate responses using multiple sub-agents. In this way, the agent can better handle a common customer scenario: questions involving not just one but multiple products and services. For example, when responding to a question about Microsoft 365 products and pricing, the agent knows to consult both the Microsoft 365 product and pricing sub-agents and combine information from these agents into a cohesive, natural language response.

title: Microsoft uses Copilot Studio to reshape customer experience and drive higher engagement | Microsoft Customer Stories
